groups.title: Employment Agency: Possible Jobs
groups.desc:
Questions 1-6
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: First Job • Job title: $1$ • Type of magazine: weekly $2$ magazine • Hours per week: $3$ hours • Starting salary: £$4$ a month Second Job • Job title: $5$ • Hours per week: 45 hours • Starting salary: £7200 a month • Source of information: $6$

groups.question_title: What is the man's attitude towards the position of writer in the following different fields?
groups.desc:
Questions 7-10
What is the man's attitude towards the position of writer in the following different fields?
Write the correct letter, A, B or C, next to Questions 7-10.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Good morning.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: How may I help you?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Good morning.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: We spoke on the phone last week, and I'm ringing to get more details about the job.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: That's right.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Thank you for sending in your CV.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: We've carefully looked at it, and I think we have several jobs that might suit you.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's great!

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: The first one is in a magazine based in North London.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: They're looking for a reporter.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What sort of magazine is it?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: They're called Home Solutions, which publishes articles on housing every week, and they want to find someone responsible for collecting the latest news and writing relevant articles.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What are the hours of work?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Well, you will be expected to work forty hours a week, but there may be opportunities to do overtime during busy periods.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: For example, some may work more than fifty hours a week and get extra pay.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: But you're not required to do this.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's reasonable.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Do you know what the rates of pay are?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It says you'll get a monthly pay of 7000 pounds for the first six months.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: And after the probationary period, you'll be eligible for a salary of more than that, maybe 7500 pounds or more.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's good.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: So, is that something that might interest you?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: It is, yes.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: The only thing is, you say they are in North London, so it would be a pretty long commute for me.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: In that case, the second position might suit you better regarding location.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: That's a researcher for an electronic engineering company in South London.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Yes, that would be a lot closer.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Your CV shows you have relevant working experience in this field.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Yes, I worked in the office of a computer engineering company for two years.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What about the working hours?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: For this job, you'll have to work 45 hours a week and the starting salary is 7200 pounds for the six-month probationary period.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That should be nice.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I can arrange for you an interview if you're interested.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: But before that, may I ask where you heard about us?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Was it in an advert or did your friend tell you?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Neither.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: It was a website.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Then I just got your number from the phone book.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, right.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Apart from full-time jobs, we have some part-time work that might suit you.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Here several magazines are recruiting part-time writers.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Are you interested?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What kind of writer exactly?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I mean, what types of articles should I write about?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Well, the first one is to do with sports reports.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: For this, you're expected to write sports articles twice weekly.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Well, I love sports.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'm a football fan.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: But as far as writing is concerned, I'm not entirely keen on that.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I think I'll rule it out.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Then how about writing something for entertainment?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Does it appeal to you?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Entertainment is an exciting topic.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I like reading news or articles in this category, but I'm not sure if I should write something about it.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Anyway, I'll think about that.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Could you give me more details?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: OK, I've got your email, and I will send the details to you later.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Thanks.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: And the third one is writing reviews for soap dramas.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Oh, soap drama is my favourite.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I worked as a freelance writer in this field three years ago.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I think it's pretty worthwhile to give my own opinions and recommendations to the audience.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: That's good.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: And the last one is writing articles for a business economy magazine.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'm unfamiliar with this field, so I think it might not be easy.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Don't worry too much.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Experience is not essential for this job.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: They've got a training session for every recruit.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That sounds not too bad.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: OK, would you like me to send you the pamphlet so that you can learn more about it?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That will be nice.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: OK, that's it.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I'll send you all the information later and ...

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 first job，提示词为 job title，此处应填职业类名词。
题目解析：本题作为开篇第一题，定位难度不大。在女士和男士两人相互介绍后，听到“The first one is ...”，提示答案即将出现，准备抓取。接着听到职业类词汇 reporter，记录下来即可。本题无干扰信息，难度不大。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 magazine，提示词为 type、weekly、magazine，此处应填形容词或名词。
题目解析：上一题结束后，通过男士提问“What sort of magazine is it?”定位到该题。女士回答“They're called Home Solutions, which publishes articles on housing every week ...”，其中 every week 对应题干的 weekly，housing 说明该杂志类型为 housing。注意，原文中的 Home Solutions 是杂志的名称而非类型，并且其也不符合题目的字数要求，因此不能填写。

3.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 per week、hours，此处应填数字。
题目解析：上一题结束后，通过男士提问“What are the hours of work?”定位到该题。女士回答“... you will be expected to work forty hours a week ...”，forty 符合题干要求，记录下来即可。注意，女士随后提到“... there may be opportunities to do overtime ... some may work more than fifty hours a week ... But you're not required to do this.”，可以判断 50 多个小时是有些加班的人的工作时间，不是必须的，属于干扰信息。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 salary，提示词为 starting、£、a month，此处应填数字。
题目解析：上一题结束后，通过男士提问“Do you know what the rates of pay are?”定位到该题。女士回答“... you'll get a monthly pay of 7000 pounds for the first six months.”，其中 monthly 对应题干的 a month，for the first six months 对应 starting，可知 7000 为正确答案。注意，女士随后提到的 7500 pounds 是试用期后可能拿到的工资，属于干扰信息。

5.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 second job，提示词为 job title，此处应填职业类名词。
题目解析：上一题结束后，原文提到 second position，提示答案即将出现，准备抓取。接着听到职业类词汇 researcher，记录下来即可。本题无干扰信息，难度不大。

6.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 source of information，此处应填名词，表示信息来源。
题目解析：题目已给信息 45 hours、7200 pounds 出现后，通过女士提问“... may I ask where you heard about us?”定位到该题。女士提供的两个选择“Was it in an advert or did your friend tell you?”都被男士否定了“Neither”。男士回答“It was a website.”，可知 website 为正确答案。注意，随后出现的 phone book 是男士找电话号码的来源，不符合题干要求。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 sports。
题目解析：这组配对题定位难度不大，题目信息在原文皆原词重现。考生在审题时需注意三个选项的区别（very、slightly、not），在听的过程中重点抓取相关信息并对应各个选项即可。本题定位词 sports 由女士提出，定位之后，男士提到“I love sports. I'm a football fan.”。注意，句中男士表示感兴趣的是运动本身，而非写作，因此还不能确认答案。男士接着提到“But as far as writing is concerned, I'm not entirely keen on that. I think I'll rule it out.”，其中 not keen on、rule it out 可以判断男士对运动领域的写作并不感兴趣，因此 C 选项为正确答案。

8.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 entertainment。
题目解析：上一题结束后，通过女士提问 entertainment 定位到该题。男士回答“Entertainment is an exciting topic ... but I'm not sure if I should write something about it... I'll think about that.”，其中 not sure 和“I'll think about that.”表明他还不确定，要考虑一下，可以判断他是有点儿感兴趣的，因此 B 选项为正确答案。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 soap drama。
题目解析：通过女士提到的“... the third one is writing reviews for soap dramas.”定位到该题。男士回答“... soap drama is my favourite ... I think it's pretty worthwhile to give my own opinions and recommendations to the audience.”，其中 favourite 和 worthwhile 可以判断他对此非常感兴趣，因此 A 选项为正确答案。

10.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 business economy magazine。
题目解析：定位词 business economy magazine 原词重现后，男士回答“I'm unfamiliar with this field ... it might not be easy”，可知他的态度是偏否定的。接着女士进行了劝说“Don't worry too much ...”，男士随后回应“That sounds not too bad.”，说明他觉得还不错。之后女士说给他发宣传册了解更多细节，他也表示同意，可以判断他也有点儿感兴趣，因此 B 选项为正确答案。
